payload.answer: I found a conflict with the existing memory about Sam’s employer. Please choose how to handle it.
citations: /brain remember Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
repair_options: Keep the existing memory: Sam works at Goldman.
Replace the existing memory with: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
Keep both as time-sensitive facts if the earlier Goldman employment is historical and the Point72 job is current.
Treat the new statement as a correction to the existing memory.
